title: Procedure
doc_html:
Art. 1529.  Procedure

Proceedings pursuant to this Chapter shall be conducted in accordance with the Louisiana Code of Criminal Procedure.

Acts 1991, No. 235, §15, eff. Jan. 1, 1992.
